positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast silhouette design featuring a mythical forest stag head intertwined with detailed geometric floral patterns. The composition should be centered and robust, suitable for a repeating print on fabric. Style should be neo-art nouveau combined with clean, minimal modern vector artwork. The color palette is restricted to deep sapphire blue and brilliant metallic gold on a transparent background, ensuring vibrant, clean lines. Emphasize sharp edges, ornate detail, and a strong, balanced silhouette. Minimal background noise. Vector illustration, perfect for textile printing.
